'''âz-b-n-f''' ('''kazabnefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ambulance|ambulance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ambulance|ambulance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-b-n-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazabnefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabnefoko|thizabnefoko]] || [[word:jizabnefoko|jizabnefoko]] || [[word:shizabnefoko|shizabnefoko]] || [[word:kizabnefoko|kizabnefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzabnefoko|thuthuzabnefoko]] || [[word:jujuzabnefoko|jujuzabnefoko]] || [[word:shushuzabnefoko|shushuzabnefoko]] || [[word:kukuzabnefoko|kukuzabnefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzabnefoko|thuzabnefoko]] || [[word:juzabnefoko|juzabnefoko]] || [[word:shuzabnefoko|shuzabnefoko]] || [[word:kuzabnefoko|kuzabnefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzabnefoko|thuzabnefoko]] || [[word:juzabnefoko|juzabnefoko]] || [[word:shuzabnefoko|shuzabnefoko]] || [[word:kuzabnefoko|kuzabnefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezabnefoko|thezabnefoko]] || [[word:jezabnefoko|jezabnefoko]] || [[word:shezabnefoko|shezabnefoko]] || [[word:kezabnefoko|kezabnefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozabnefoko|thothozabnefoko]] || [[word:jojozabnefoko|jojozabnefoko]] || [[word:shoshozabnefoko|shoshozabnefoko]] || [[word:kokozabnefoko|kokozabnefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozabnefoko|thozabnefoko]] || [[word:jozabnefoko|jozabnefoko]] || [[word:shozabnefoko|shozabnefoko]] || [[word:kozabnefoko|kozabnefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozabnefoko|thozabnefoko]] || [[word:jozabnefoko|jozabnefoko]] || [[word:shozabnefoko|shozabnefoko]] || [[word:kozabnefoko|kozabnefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzabnefoko|thĂŠzabnefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzabnefoko|jĂŠzabnefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzabnefoko|shĂŠzabnefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzabnefoko|kĂŠzabnefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazabnefoko|thathazabnefoko]] || [[word:jajazabnefoko|jajazabnefoko]] || [[word:shashazabnefoko|shashazabnefoko]] || [[word:kakazabnefoko|kakazabnefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazabnefoko|thazabnefoko]] || [[word:jazabnefoko|jazabnefoko]] || [[word:shazabnefoko|shazabnefoko]] || [[word:kazabnefoko|kazabnefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazabnefoko|thazabnefoko]] || [[word:jazabnefoko|jazabnefoko]] || [[word:shazabnefoko|shazabnefoko]] || [[word:kazabnefoko|kazabnefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazabnefithi|shazabnefithi]] || [[word:shazabnefiji|shazabnefiji]] || [[word:shazabnefishi|shazabnefishi]] || [[word:shazabnefiki|shazabnefiki]]
